fields.title: Urban Solar Corridor Installation
fields.description: Deployment of rooftop solar arrays along the A64 business corridor. Includes PV installation, micro-inverter setup, and battery storage integration to supply renewable power to surrounding council buildings.

fields.title: Green Roof Retrofit – Central Library
fields.description: Installation of a living green roof on the Grade II listed Central Library. Work includes specialist waterproofing, native wildflower planting, and improved rainwater harvesting to reduce runoff.

fields.title: Micklegate Habitat Restoration Zone
fields.description: Creation of a biodiversity corridor around Micklegate Bar. Involves limestone wall conservation using low-impact materials, installation of pollinator-friendly planting, and habitat structures for bats and swifts.

fields.title: Clifton Primary Eco-Extension
fields.description: Construction of a modular, energy-positive classroom using timber framing, heat-pump technology, solar panels, and natural ventilation. Includes installation of a mini-wildlife garden and outdoor learning space.

fields.title: Deansgate Low-Carbon Transit Upgrade
fields.description: Revamp of Deansgate tram stop with fully LED solar-powered lighting, real-time digital signage powered by micro-grids, installation of green walls, and accessible routes designed with sustainable materials.

fields.title: Heaton Park Re-Wilding & Climate Buffer
fields.description: Large-scale re-wilding of Heaton Park. Includes planting 1,500 native trees, wildflower meadow creation, pond restoration for amphibian habitat, and drainage redesign to improve climate resilience.
